x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: GRC Performance Analytics indicators provide trend data Now Assist uses for predictive compliance insights.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create PA indicators for key GRC metrics (control pass rate, risk exposure, open issues). Schedule data collection jobs. Target: 3+ active indicators covering risk, compliance, and audit domains.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cff
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[GRC Performance Analytics indicators provide trend data Now Assist uses for predictive compliance insights.]]></ai_justification><check_name>GRC Performance Analytics</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    // Use separate queries per keyword to avoid OR precedence issues
    // then deduplicate by sys_id to avoid double-counting indicators
    // that match multiple keywords
    var matched = {};

    function collectMatches(keyword) {
        var gr = new GlideRecord('pa_indicators');
        gr.addQuery('active', true);
        gr.addQuery('name', 'CONTAINS', keyword);
        gr.query();
        while (gr.next()) {
            matched[gr.getUniqueValue()] = true;
        }
    }

    collectMatches('risk');
    collectMatches('compliance');
    collectMatches('audit');

    var count = Object.keys(matched).length;
    var actualValue = count + ' active GRC PA indicators';

    if (count >= 3) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: count + ' active GRC PA indicators — Now Assist can provide trend-based compliance AI insights.'
        };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + count + ' active GRC PA indicator(s) (target: 3+). Now Assist GRC trend-based insights will be limited — point-in-time analysis only for uncovered metrics.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'No active GRC PA indicators found. Now Assist GRC uses trend data for predictive compliance insights — without PA data AI can only provide point-in-time analysis.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>GRC</module><number>CHK0000466</number><order>120</order><remediation_guidance>Create PA indicators for key GRC metrics (control pass rate, risk exposure, open issues). Schedule data collection jobs. Target: 3+ active indicators covering risk, compliance, and audit domains.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>8ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cff</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>GRC Performance Analytics</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_8ff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cff</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
